visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A pair of hands in dark blue sleeves holds a rose-gold, rectangular box vertically against a plain white studio background. The box features a prominent gold foil logo depicting a dragon head integrated into an apple shape. Digital sparkles float across the frame under bright, even lighting. (2) The hands rotate the box 180 degrees to show its back, which features a cross-folded, envelope-style closure. The fingers carefully begin to lift the side flaps, revealing the textured, high-quality metallic finish of the rose-gold material. The camera remains static, focusing on the tactile movement of the unboxing. (3) As the envelope is unfolded completely, it reveals an intricate inner lining with fish-scale embossed patterns and gold-stamped celestial starburst designs. The person uses their fingers to spread the multiple layers open, demonstrating the complex, multi-fold architectural construction of the premium red-envelope packaging. (4) A set of five smaller, matching rose-gold red envelopes is pulled out from the main folder and fanned out. Each envelope features the same embossed scale pattern and metallic sheen. A Traditional Chinese subtitle appears at the bottom of the screen while the final product set is displayed.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Apple Dragon hybrid. (2) [Subtitle]: 左右都龍賺.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Only a pair of hands is visible throughout the entire video sequence.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A person with fair skin and well-groomed hands, wearing a dark blue long-sleeved top, is shown handling the product.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist off-white wall background with digital sparkle and bokeh light effects overlaid during post-production.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo festive background music begins immediately, featuring prominent rhythmic Chinese percussion and a bright, joyful woodwind melody. The music creates a celebratory Lunar New Year atmosphere. There is no human speech present. The background noise floor is extremely clean. (2) As the handling of the package continues, the music maintains its steady energy. Subtle, low-intensity rustling sounds from the paper material being unfolded are audible, naturally blending with the high-frequency transients of the rhythmic percussion in the track. (3) The festive BGM loops seamlessly until the end of the clip. The audio maintains a consistent volume with no speech overlays. The track conclude with a final musical cadence, exhibiting professional studio tonal clarity and high spectral brightness.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the intricate design and luxury material of a limited-edition, dragon-themed 'Apple' branded red envelope set for the Lunar New Year, highlighting its premium collectibility.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is a dedicated presentation focusing on the unboxing and aesthetic details of a specific branded product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A clean, high-production-value unboxing video that utilizes festive music and minimalist visuals to appeal to consumers interested in luxury brand merchandise and holiday traditions.
